description_long: This is a modern, single-story residential house complex featuring a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The structure is divided into multiple interconnected units, each with its own entrance and garage, and is surrounded by landscaped greenery including several trees and shrubs. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and brown materials, likely stucco and brick or concrete, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property faces a paved street with a sidewalk and includes a driveway and a blue vehicle parked in front. The house has a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic with open courtyards and private outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes functionality, privacy, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, single-story house complex with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped greenery, featuring multiple units and garages facing a paved street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrances, garages, landscaped trees, and a blue vehicle parked on the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, the arrangement of units, and the driveway leading to the garages.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, private outdoor spaces, and the flat roof structure of each unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the alignment of the units, additional greenery, and the street access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with overhangs or small porches, and direct access from the driveway; minimal decorative elements.
